title: Allow Monday Teams-based permissions within the Sales CRM
excerpt: I was shocked to find that the ability to add Monday “Teams” to drive permissions within boards or items - as is easy and native within the WorkOS - is not possible within the Sales CRM. I must manually add dozens of use…

posts.author: JECrawford (Justin Crawford)
posts.cookedHtml:
I was shocked to find that the ability to add Monday “Teams” to drive permissions within boards or items - as is easy and native within the WorkOS - is not possible within the Sales CRM. I must manually add dozens of users to every board and every item I need them to see… creating a lot of work, and risk for error. It’s making the entire Sales CRM Product almost unworkable for us.

We would GREATLY value the same ability to “Add a Team” to items or board permissions as is possible within the Work OS to be possible within the Sales CRM Product.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @JECrawford and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

I have shared your feedback with the team and created a request for our team so that it can hopefully lead to this being available in the future

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Request monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done
